mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_stats (CTNT_NO, REPLY_CNT) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE REPLY_CNT = VALUES(REPLY_CNT), UPD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE content_stats SET REPLY_CNT = #{replyCnt}, UPD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = #{commentCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
